title: toe-decoherence-validation: Empirical Validation of the ToE Consistency Relation
description: Analysis code and reproducibility pipeline for empirical validation of the Theory of Everything (ToE) consistency relation Q(k) = c_s*/(1+2*nbar_k) using BICEP/Keck 2018 + Planck 2018 + BAO public MCMC chains. Includes Mukhanov-Sasaki solver, three-channel joint analysis (consistency ratio, ring-down, f_NL suppression), sensitivity maps, and one-claim paper.
